verses.geez:
ወመጽአ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ወነገሮ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ አቡየ ፡ ወአኀዊየ ፡ ወእንስሳሆሙ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ንዋዮሙ ፡ መጽኡ ፡
                  እምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ በጽሑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ጌሴም ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph came and told Pharao, saying, My father, and my brethren, and their cattle, and their oxen, and all their possessions, are come out of the land of Chanaan, and, behold, they are in the land of Gesem.
translations.kjv: Then Joseph came and told Pharaoh, and said, My father and my brethren, and their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have, are come out of the land of Canaan; and, behold, they are in the land of Goshen.

verses.geez: ወነሥአ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ እምአኀዊሁ ፡ ኀምስተ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወአብጽሖሙ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And he took of his brethren five men, and set them before Pharao.
translations.kjv: And he took some of his brethren, even five men, and presented them unto Pharaoh.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለአኀዊሁ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ምንት ፡ ተግባርክሙ ፤ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ኖሎተ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ንሕነ ፡
                  አግብርቲከ ፡ ንሕነሂ ፡ ወአበዊነሂ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao said to the brethren of Joseph, What is your occupation? and they said to Pharao, Thy servants are shepherds, both we and our fathers.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said unto his brethren, What is your occupation? And they said unto Pharaoh, Thy servants are shepherds, both we, and also our fathers.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ አኅድረነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ መጻእነ ፡ እስመ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ምርዓየ ፡ ለእንስሳ
                  ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ ወዐብየ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፤ ወይእዜኒ ፡ አኅድር ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ጌሴም
                  ።

translations.lxx: And they said to Pharao, We are come to sojourn in the land, for there is no pasture for the flocks of thy servants, for the famine has prevailed in the land of Chanaan; now then, we will dwell in the land of Gesem. And Pharao said to Joseph, Let them dwell in the land of Gesem; and if thou knowest that there are among them able men, make them overseers of my cattle. So Jacob and his sons came into Egypt, to Joseph; and Pharao, king of Egypt, heard of it.
translations.kjv: They said moreover unto Pharaoh, For to sojourn in the land are we come; for thy servants have no pasture for their flocks; for the famine is sore in the land of Canaan: now therefore, we pray thee, let thy servants dwell in the land of Goshen.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ እስመ ፡ መጽኡ ፡ አቡከ ፡ ወአኀዊከ ፡ ኀቤከ ፤

translations.lxx: And Pharao spoke to Joseph, saying, Thy father, and thy brethren, are come to thee.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh spake unto Joseph, saying, Thy father and thy brethren are come unto thee:

verses.geez:
ናሁ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትኄይስ ፡ ይኅድሩ ፡ አቡከ ፡ ወአኀዊከ ፡ ወእመሰ ፡ ቦቱ
                  ፡ እለ ፡ ታአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ጽኑዓነ ፡ በውስቴቶሙ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ ሢሞሙ ፡ መላእክተ ፡ ኖሎት ፡ ለእንስሳየ ።

translations.lxx: Behold, the land of Egypt is before thee; settle thy father and thy brethren in the best land.
translations.kjv: The land of Egypt is before thee; in the best of the land make thy father and brethren to dwell; in the land of Goshen let them dwell: and if thou knowest any men of activity among them, then make them rulers over my cattle.

verses.geez: ወአምጽኦ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለአቡሁ ፡ ወአቀሞ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወባረኮ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph brought in Jacob his father, and set him before Pharao; and Jacob blessed Pharao.
translations.kjv: And Joseph brought in Jacob his father, and set him before Pharaoh: and Jacob blessed Pharaoh.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ሚመጠን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ዘሐየውከ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao said to Jacob, How many are the years of the days of thy life?
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh said unto Jacob, How old art thou?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ሕይወትየሰ ፡ ዘሐየውኩ ፡ ምእት ፡ ወሠላሳ ፡ እማንቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ሕዳጥ ፡
                  ወእኩያተ ፡ ኮናኒ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ሕይወትየ ፡ ወዓመትየኒ ፡ ወኢከመ ፡ ምንት ፡ ኮናኒ ፡ በኀበ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ አበዊየ ፡ ዘሐይዉ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said to Pharao, The days of the years of my life, wherein I sojourn, are a hundred and thirty years; few and evil have been the days of the years of my life, they have not attained to the days of the life of my fathers, in which days they sojourned.
translations.kjv: And Jacob said unto Pharaoh, The days of the years of my pilgrimage are an hundred and thirty years: few and evil have the days of the years of my life been, and have not attained unto the days of the years of the life of my fathers in the days of their pilgrimage.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ባረኮ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወፅአ ፡ እምኀቤሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob blessed Pharao, and departed from him.
translations.kjv: And Jacob blessed Pharaoh, and went out from before Pharaoh.

verses.geez:
ወአኅደሮሙ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለአቡሁ ፡ ወለአኀዊሁ ፡ ወወሀቦሙ ፡ ምኵናነ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትኄይስ ፡
                  ምድር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ [ራምሴ ፡] ዘአዘዘ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph settled his father and his brethren, and gave them a possession in the land of Egypt, in the best land, in the land of Ramesses, as Pharao commanded.
translations.kjv: And Joseph placed his father and his brethren, and gave them a possession in the land of Egypt, in the best of the land, in the land of Rameses, as Pharaoh had commanded.

verses.geez:
ወዮሴፍ ፡ ይሰፍር ፡ ስርናየ ፡ ሲሳየ ፡ [ለ]አቡሁ ፡ ወለአኀዊሁ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ለለ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ነፍስ ፡
                  ይሰፍር ፡ ሲሳየ ፡ ስርናየ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph gave provision to his father, and his brethren, and to all the house of his father, corn for each person.
translations.kjv: And Joseph nourished his father, and his brethren, and all his father’s household, with bread, according to their families.

verses.geez:
ወአልቦ ፡ ስርናየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዐብየ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወኀልቀ ፡ በረኃብ ፡ ብሔረ ፡
                  ግብጽ ፡ ወከናአን ።

translations.lxx: And there was no corn in all the land, for the famine prevailed greatly; and the land of Egypt, and the land of Chanaan, fainted for the famine.
translations.kjv: And there was no bread in all the land; for the famine was very sore, so that the land of Egypt and all the land of Canaan fainted by reason of the famine.

verses.geez:
ወአስተጋብአ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ዘአምጽኡ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወሰብአ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ሤጠ ፡ እክል ፡ ዘሤጠ ፡
                  ሎሙ ፡ ወአብአ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph gathered all the money that was found in the land of Egypt, and the land of Chanaan, in return for the corn which they bought, and he distributed corn to them; and Joseph brought all the money into the house of Pharao.
translations.kjv: And Joseph gathered up all the money that was found in the land of Egypt, and in the land of Canaan, for the corn which they bought: and Joseph brought the money into Pharaoh’s house.

verses.geez:
ወኀልቀ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ዘብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወዘብሔረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወመጽኡ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዮሴፍ
                  ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ሀበነ ፡ እክለ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢንሙት ፡ በቅድሜከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኀልቀ ፡ ወርቅነ ።

translations.lxx: And all the money failed out of the land of Egypt, and out of the land of Chanaan; and all the Egyptians came to Joseph, saying, Give us bread, and why do we die in thy presence? for our money is spent.
translations.kjv: And when money failed in the land of Egypt, and in the land of Canaan, all the Egyptians came unto Joseph, and said, Give us bread: for why should we die in thy presence? for the money faileth.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ አምጽኡ ፡ እንስሳክሙ ፡ ወአሀብክሙ ፡ እክለ ፡ ህየንተ ፡ እንስሳክሙ ፡ እመ ፡ ኀልቀ ፡ ወርቅክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph said to them, Bring your cattle, and I will give you bread for your cattle, if your money is spent.
translations.kjv: And Joseph said, Give your cattle; and I will give you for your cattle, if money fail.

verses.geez:
ወአምጽኡ ፡ እንስሳሆሙ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ወወሀቦሙ ፡ እክለ ፡ ህየንተ ፡ አባግዒሆሙ ፡ ወአልህምቲሆሙ ፡ ወህየንተ ፡
                  አእዱጊሆሙ ፡ ሴሰዮሙ ፡ እክለ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዓመት ።

translations.lxx: And they brought their cattle to Joseph; and Joseph gave them bread in return for their horses, and for their sheep, and for their oxen, and for their asses; and Joseph maintained them with bread for all their cattle in that year.
translations.kjv: And they brought their cattle unto Joseph: and Joseph gave them bread in exchange for horses, and for the flocks, and for the cattle of the herds, and for the asses: and he fed them with bread for all their cattle for that year.

verses.geez:
ወኀልቀት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ወመጽኡ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ በካልእት ፡ ዓመት ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢንሙት ፡ ወኢንኅለቅ ፡
                  ለእግዚእነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ተወድአ ፡ ወርቅነሂ ፡ ወንዋይነሂ ፡ ወእንስሳነሂ ፡ ወአኅለቅናሁ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡
                  ዘተረፈ ፡ ለነ ፡ በቅድሜከ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ሥጋነ ፡ ዘዚአነ ፡ ወምድርነ ።

translations.lxx: And that year passed, and they came to him in the second year, and said to him, Must we then be consumed from before our lord? for if our money has failed, and our possessions, and our cattle, brought to thee our lord, and there has not been left to us before our lord more than our own bodies and our land, we are indeed destitute.
translations.kjv: When that year was ended, they came unto him the second year, and said unto him, We will not hide it from my lord, how that our money is spent; my lord also hath our herds of cattle; there is not ought left in the sight of my lord, but our bodies, and our lands:

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ኢንሙት ፡ እንከ ፡ በቅድሜከ ፡ ወምድርነኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትማስን ፡ ንሥአነ ፡ ወአጥርየነ ፡ ኪያነሂ ፡ ወምድረነሂ ፡
                  ህየንተ ፡ እክል ፡ ወንኩን ፡ አግብርተ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወምድርነሂ ፡ ትኩን ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወሀበነ ፡ ዘርአ ፡ ወንዝራእ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ንሕየው ፡ ወኢንሙት ፡ ወምድርነሂ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትማስን ።

translations.lxx: In order, then, that we die not before thee, and the land be made desolate, buy us and our land for bread, and we and our land will be servants to Pharao: give seed that we may sow, and live and not die, so our land shall not be made desolate.
translations.kjv: Wherefore shall we die before thine eyes, both we and our land? buy us and our land for bread, and we and our land will be servants unto Pharaoh: and give us seed, that we may live, and not die, that the land be not desolate.

verses.geez:
ወአጥረየ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ምድሮሙ ፡ ለግብጽ ፡ ወአግብአ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ምድሮሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኀየሎሙ ፡ ረኃብ ፡
                  ወኮነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድር ፡ ለፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph bought all the land of the Egyptians, for Pharao; for the Egyptians sold their land to Pharao; for the famine prevailed against them, and the land became Pharao's.
translations.kjv: And Joseph bought all the land of Egypt for Pharaoh; for the Egyptians sold every man his field, because the famine prevailed over them: so the land became Pharaoh’s.

verses.geez:
ወኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ኮንዎ ፡ አግብርቲሁ ፡ ወቀነዮሙ ፡ እምአጽናፈ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወአድባሪሆሙኒ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለግብጽ
                  ፡ እምአጽናፈ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And he brought the people into bondage to him, for servants, from one extremity of Egypt to the other,
translations.kjv: And as for the people, he removed them to cities from one end of the borders of Egypt even to the other end thereof.

verses.geez:
ዘእንበለ ፡ ምድሮሙ ፡ ለማርያን ፡ ባሕቲታ ፡ እንተ ፡ ኢያጥረየ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ እስመ ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለማርያን ፡
                  ወፈተቶሙ ፡ ወጸገዎሙ ፡ ወበእንተዝ ፡ ኢሤጡ ፡ ምድሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: except only the land of the priests; Joseph bought not this, for Pharao gave a portion in the way of gift to the priests; and they ate their portion which Pharao gave them; therefore they sold not their land.
translations.kjv: Only the land of the priests bought he not; for the priests had a portion assigned them of Pharaoh, and did eat their portion which Pharaoh gave them: wherefore they sold not their lands.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለኵሎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ተሣየጥኩክሙ ፡ ኪያክሙሂ ፡ ወምድርክሙሂ ፡ ለፈርዖን
                  ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ዘርአ ፡ ወዝርእዋ ፡ ለምድርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph said to all the Egyptians, Behold, I have bought you and your land this day for Pharao; take seed for you, and sow the land.
translations.kjv: Then Joseph said unto the people, Behold, I have bought you this day and your land for Pharaoh: lo, here is seed for you, and ye shall sow the land.

verses.geez:
ወታገብኡ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ እክለ ፡ ኃምስተ ፡ እደ ፡ (ክፍለ ፡) ወአርባዕተ ፡ እደ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ዘይከውነክሙ ፡ ዘርአ ፡
                  ለምድርክሙ ፡ ወለሲሳይክሙ ፡ ወለሲሳየ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሰብእክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And there shall be the fruits of it; and ye shall give the fifth part to Pharao, and the four remaining parts shall be for yourselves, for seed for the earth, and for food for you, and all that are in your houses.
translations.kjv: And it shall come to pass in the increase, that ye shall give the fifth part unto Pharaoh, and four parts shall be your own, for seed of the field, and for your food, and for them of your households, and for food for your little ones.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ አሕየውከነ ፡ ወረከብነ ፡ ሞገሰ ፡ በቅድሜሁ ፡ ለእግዚእነ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ አግብርተ ፡ ለፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And they said, Thou hast saved us; we have found favour before our lord, and we will be servants to Pharao.
translations.kjv: And they said, Thou hast saved our lives: let us find grace in the sight of my lord, and we will be Pharaoh’s servants.

verses.geez:
ወኮነት ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ሥርዐት ፡ እንተ ፡ ሠርዐ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወቆመት ፡ እስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡
                  ከመ ፡ ያግብኡ ፡ ኃምስተ ፡ እደ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ማርያን ፡ ባሕቲታ ፡ እንተ ፡ ኢኮነት
                  ፡ ለፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph appointed it to them for an ordinance until this day; to reserve a fifth part for Pharao, on the land of Egypt, except only the land of the priests, that was not Pharao's.
translations.kjv: And Joseph made it a law over the land of Egypt unto this day, that Pharaoh should have the fifth part; except the land of the priests only, which became not Pharaoh’s.

verses.geez: ወነበረ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጌሴም ፡ ወኮነት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ክፍሎሙ ፡ ወበዝኁ ፡ ወመልኡ ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: And Israel dwelt in Egypt, in the land of Gesem, and they gained an inheritance upon it; and they increased and multiplied very greatly.
translations.kjv: And Israel dwelt in the land of Egypt, in the country of Goshen; and they had possessions therein, and grew, and multiplied exceedingly.

verses.geez:
ወሐይወ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ዐሠርተ ፡ ወሰባዕተ ፡ ዓመተ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ዓመተ ፡ ሕይወቱ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ምእተ
                  ፡ ወአርብዓ ፡ ወ[ሰባዕት ፡] ዓመተ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob survived seventeen years in the land of Egypt; and Jacob's days of the years of his life were a hundred and forty-seven years.
translations.kjv: And Jacob lived in the land of Egypt seventeen years: so the whole age of Jacob was an hundred forty and seven years.

verses.geez:
ወቀርበ ፡ መዋዕሊሁ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ለመዊት ፡ ወጸውዖ ፡ ለወልዱ ፡ [ዮሴፍ ፡] ወይቤሎ ፡ እመ ፡ ረከብኩ ፡ ሞገሰ ፡
                  ቅድሜከ ፡ ደይ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሥጋየ ፡ ወግበር ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ወጽድቀ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትቅብረኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ግብጽ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And the days of Israel drew nigh for him to die: and he called his son Joseph, and said to him, If I have found favour before thee, put thy hand under my thigh, and thou shalt execute mercy and truth toward me, so as not to bury me in Egypt.
translations.kjv: And the time drew nigh that Israel must die: and he called his son Joseph, and said unto him, If now I have found grace in thy sight, put, I pray thee, thy hand under my thigh, and deal kindly and truly with me; bury me not, I pray thee, in Egypt:

verses.geez:
ዳእሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ እኑም ፡ ምስለ ፡ አበዊየ ፡ ወአውጽአኒ ፡ እምነ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወቅብረኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቃብሮሙ ፡
                  ለአበዊየ ፤ ወይቤሎ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ኦሆ ፡ እገብር ፡ በከመ ፡ ትቤ ።

translations.lxx: But I will sleep with my fathers, and thou shalt carry me up out of Egypt, and bury me in their sepulchre. And he said, I will do according to thy word.
translations.kjv: But I will lie with my fathers, and thou shalt carry me out of Egypt, and bury me in their buryingplace. And he said, I will do as thou hast said.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ መሐልኬ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ወመሐለ ፡ ሎቴ ፡ ወሰገደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ በትሩ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, Swear to me; and he swore to him. And Israel did reverence, leaning on the top of his staff.
translations.kjv: And he said, Swear unto me. And he sware unto him. And Israel bowed himself upon the bed’s head.
